breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Antarctic Gravity Error Worse Than Reported: 1,430×, Not 170×
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: WIN-067's headline error factor updated from 170× to 1,430× — the correct apples-to-apples comparison of the dome's predicted gravity drop at the Antarctic rim vs the actual observed drop. The 170× figure was a conservative understatement using the global pole-equator spread. The rigorously computed 1,430× ratio makes the dome's Antarctic gravity claim ~8× more embarrassing than previously advertised.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Significant numerical correction to a headline claim. 1,430× is the defensible comparison; 170× was systematically underestimating the error.
